positive: A whimsical, detailed linocut style illustration of a group of woodland creatures having a picnic. The main subjects include a fox, a squirrel, a rabbit, and a blue jay, gathered around a checkered blanket laden with stylized baskets, berries, and wildflowers. The composition is centered and balanced, creating a perfect symmetrical print layout. Use high contrast black ink on a cream background, emphasizing thick, clean silhouettes and intricate linework reminiscent of mid-century book illustrations. Include varying levels of detail for visual interest but keep lines sharp and clear for fabric printing. Studio lighting, vector art quality.
